testcase.name: TC05

failure.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. testcase.name: TC03

failure.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.] but found [Invalid username or password.
